Disaster Recovery Runbook — local-only knowledge substrate
===========================================================

Scope: this runbook documents the recovery procedures for the
local-only knowledge substrate after data loss, daemon crash, or
filesystem corruption.

Step 1 — Stop the daemon. Run `corpus daemon stop`. Verify the PID
file is removed.

Step 2 — Inspect the failure-lane sidecars. Run `corpus failures
list` to enumerate any documents that failed validation or
classification. Each sidecar carries the failure category +
remediation hint.

Step 3 — Re-classify sentinel rows. Run `corpus reenrich --dry-run`
first to preview the work, then `corpus reenrich` to drain any
classify-stage sentinel rows produced before SP-004 shipped.

Step 4 — Backfill the SP-005 indexes. Run `corpus reindex --dry-run`
followed by `corpus reindex` to populate the FTS5 + vec + edges
tables for classified documents.

Step 5 — Restart the daemon. Run `corpus daemon start`. Verify a
`daemon.started` telemetry event was emitted with the expected
recovery-scan summary.
